title: 1 Tex. Admin. Code § 3.5 - Submission Process
text:
(a) When applying
for a grant pursuant to a RFA published by the PSO in either eGrants or the
Texas Register, applicants must submit and certify their
applications according to the requirements provided in the RFA.
